title: EEG Storytime
subtitle: Listen to stories while we record brain activity
description: Sit back and enjoy a story while wearing a comfortable cap with small sensors that record your brain's electrical activity. There are no needles, no discomfort — just listening! We use this to understand how the brain processes language in real time.

title: Eye-Tracking While Reading
subtitle: Read sentences while a camera tracks your eye movements
description: A small camera watches where your eyes move as you read sentences on a screen. Nothing touches you — the camera just follows your gaze. This helps us understand how people make sense of language as they read.

title: Visual World Study
subtitle: Look at pictures while listening to sentences
description: Your child will look at fun pictures on a screen while listening to short sentences. A gentle camera tracks where their eyes go — no touching, no discomfort! This helps us learn how children understand language as it unfolds.
